prompt: Which 3 analytics modules have the highest average user rating (with at least 5 ratings)? And which 3 modules have the lowest average rating (with at least 3 ratings)? For each, show the module name, average rating, and a sample review title.
output:

|------|------------|-------|
| Talent Retention Predictor | 5.0 | Finally, data-driven forecasting |
| Order Fulfilment Tracker | 4.666666666666667 | Exceeded our accuracy targets |

| Transportation Network Optimizer | 3.0 | Model needs more training data |
| GTM Readiness Planner | 3.2 | Data freshness issues |
| Innovation Pipeline Dashboard | 3.3333333333333335 | Useful but needs calibration |
